# Windsurf Editor Changelog - Feature Announcements

## Version 1.9600.40 (April 6, 2026)
- Improved visibility of the adaptive model option within the model picker interface

## Version 1.9600.38 (April 6, 2026)
- Introducing Adaptive: New model router that intelligently selects the best model for each task
- Available to all self-serve users on Pro, Max, and Teams plans
- Dynamically chooses the appropriate underlying model while maintaining fixed per-token quota consumption
- Updated Model Picker with token pricing display showing input, output, and cache read rates per model
- New prompt cache timer integrated into context window indicator
- Token counts included in response cards for cost transparency

## Version 1.9577.43 (March 19, 2026)
- Introduced support for a new quota billing system
- Daily and weekly quota usage metrics now visible directly in the IDE
- Fixed Mac x64 build issues

## Version 1.9577.42 (March 19, 2026)
- Various bug fixes and performance enhancements

## GPT-5.4 Mini Announcement (March 17, 2026)
- GPT-5.4 Mini available at promotional pricing of 1x credits

## Version 1.9577.27 (March 12, 2026)
- Addressed compatibility issues with Apple M5 processors

## Version 1.9577.24 (March 9, 2026)
- Cascade: Resolved dangling diff zones for Jupyter Notebooks, enhanced Jupyter performance on WSL, improved UI rendering, stabilized agent panel, better model price change notifications, added SKILL.md file support from `.windsurf/skills/` directory, fixed AGENTS.md processing issues
- MCP: Added system-level skill definitions support via MDM-managed configs for Enterprise clients, improved MCP server context management
- Stability & Performance: Enhanced autocomplete error handling and performance, improved SSH and remote connection performance

## New Models & AI Capabilities

**GPT-5.4 & GPT-5.4 Mini** (March 5-17, 2026)
- Latest OpenAI models with multiple reasoning effort levels available at promotional pricing

**Gemini 3.1 Pro** (February 19, 2026)
- New Google model with thinking capabilities at discounted rates

**Claude Sonnet 4.6 & Claude Opus 4.6** (February 17, 2026)
- Anthropic models with thinking support; Opus 4.6 fast mode offers 2.5x faster output

**GLM-5 & Minimax M2.5** (February 17, 2026)
- International AI models at promotional pricing; included in Arena battle groups

**GPT-5.2-Codex** (January 14, 2026)
- "OpenAI's latest model designed for agentic coding" with four reasoning effort options

**SWE-1.5 Free** (December 24, 2025)
- Near-frontier coding model available free for three months

**Gemini 3 Flash** (December 27, 2025)
- Combines Pro-level reasoning with Flash-speed efficiency

## Major Features & Platforms

**Arena Mode** (January 30, 2026)
- Side-by-side model comparison with hidden identities; vote on preferred outputs
- Personal and global leaderboards tracking user preferences

**Plan Mode** (January 30, 2026)
- New Cascade mode for creating detailed implementation plans before coding

**Multi-Cascade Sessions** (December 24, 2025)
- Simultaneous parallel Cascade sessions in separate panes and tabs

**Git Worktree Support** (December 24, 2025)
- Spawn multiple Cascade sessions without branch conflicts

**Cascade Dedicated Terminal** (December 24, 2025)
- New zsh shell for improved command reliability and interactivity

**Agent Skills** (January 12, 2026)
- Custom skills framework enabling agents to execute specialized tasks

**Model Context Protocol (MCP)** (January 26, 2025)
- Integration with custom MCP servers for extended tool capabilities; OAuth support

**Windsurf Previews** (March 5, 2025)
- Local website preview within IDE; select React elements for context sharing

**Codemaps** (October 10, 2025)
- Codebase visualization and navigation tool with chat and Mermaid diagrams

**Fast Context** (October 16, 2025)
- "SWE-grep subagent enabling agents to find relevant code 20x faster"

**Vibe and Replace** (August 14, 2025)
- AI-powered find-and-replace with intelligent transformations across multiple matches

**DeepWiki Integration** (August 14, 2025)
- Hover documentation for code symbols with intelligent context-aware help

## Last Fetched
2026-04-07
